name: STING — Title-block family library
description: Generator spec for STING title-block .rfa families. Two-family BIM architecture: each working-sheet paper size ships in BOTH landscape and portrait orientations × BIM/NONBIM modes (5 × 2 × 2 = 20 working sheets), plus 14 specialty title blocks (4 fabrication assembly + 2 presentation + cover + divider + register + transmittal cover + 3 submission + clarification). Every concrete family extends a size+orientation abstract common which itself extends A1_common_v2.0 — the master identity-data parameter universe. Parameter set follows TITLE_BLOCK_FAMILY_DESIGN.md §2.1 — all shared params sourced from MR_PARAMETERS.txt, no fabricated GUIDs.

families.description: A1 landscape working sheet — common base shared between BIM and NONBIM variants. Parameter set per TITLE_BLOCK_FAMILY_DESIGN.md §2.1 — Group A (project / originator / consultants / contractor identity + addresses) + Group C (authoring drawn/checked/approved). Defines the bottom-strip layout, outer border, and the 8 viewport slots. Concrete variants extend this and overlay BIM-specific or NONBIM-specific cells.

slots.description: Main drawing area — full-bleed plan / 3D / section

families.description: A1 landscape working sheet — full ISO 19650 BIM identity. Adds the 7-segment sheet ID strip, suitability chip + descriptive label, status band, revision-history register, federation status, LOIN/LOD, transmittal/CDE references, and the 4-eyes AUTHORISED BY signature row over the common base.

A1 landscape working sheet — minimal non-BIM identity. Reuses the common identity-data + drawn/checked/approved block but skips the ISO-19650 sheet ID, suitability chip, and revision-history register. Sheet number is bound via PRJ_TB_SHEET_NR_TXT (the existing simple sheet identifier).

A0 landscape working sheet (1189 × 841 mm) — common base shared between BIM and NONBIM variants. Inherits the 40-param identity-data universe from A1_common_v2.0 and adds geometry sized for this paper. Five-column bottom strip (CLIENT/PROJECT/CONSULTANTS — NOTES/PROJECT-REF/DISCIPLINE/STAGE — DRAWING TITLE — DATES/AUTHORING — SHEET ID), strip height 130 mm, drawable zone 1169 × 696 mm.

slots.description: Main drawing area — full-bleed plan / 3D / section
Notes panel — drafting view or legend with general notes
Discipline legend — symbol key matching the active discipline
Revision-history schedule — auto-populated from Revit's revision data
North-arrow symbol — nested family, hides via TB_SHOW_NORTH_ARROW_BOOL
Scale-bar — nested family, hides via TB_SHOW_SCALEBAR_BOOL

families.description: A0 landscape working sheet — full ISO 19650 BIM identity (top BIM strip with status / suitability chip / revision / LOIN / federation, plus 7-segment sheet ID row). Extends A0_LAND_common_v2.0 — inherits the 5-column bottom strip + slots.
A0 landscape working sheet — minimal NONBIM identity (large sheet-number block in the right column). Extends A0_LAND_common_v2.0 — inherits the 5-column bottom strip + slots.

A0 portrait working sheet (841 × 1189 mm) — common base shared between BIM and NONBIM variants. Inherits the 40-param identity-data universe from A1_common_v2.0 and adds geometry sized for this paper. Five-column bottom strip (CLIENT/PROJECT/CONSULTANTS — NOTES/PROJECT-REF/DISCIPLINE/STAGE — DRAWING TITLE — DATES/AUTHORING — SHEET ID), strip height 130 mm, drawable zone 821 × 1044 mm.

Fabrication assembly title block — pipe spool. A1 landscape, 200 mm BOM strip on the right (6 cols × 18 rows), 80 mm bottom title strip with fab metadata (SPOOL # / DISCIPLINE / WEIGHT / FAB LOC / STATUS / BOM REV / ISSUE DATE / PROJECT / DRG NO). Discipline accent stripe in #0076A8. Drawable 636×509 mm — fits a typical 1:25 spool isometric.

slots.description: Main fabrication isometric / spool drawing area for the pipe spool
Bill of Materials — Revit Schedule view inside the right-strip
Cut list / lengths summary — small schedule
Spool reference list — drafting view callout linking to other spools

families.description: Fabrication assembly title block — duct spool. A1 landscape, 200 mm BOM strip on the right (6 cols × 18 rows), 80 mm bottom title strip with fab metadata (SPOOL # / DISCIPLINE / WEIGHT / FAB LOC / STATUS / BOM REV / ISSUE DATE / PROJECT / DRG NO). Discipline accent stripe in #F2A341. Drawable 636×509 mm — fits a typical 1:25 spool isometric.

slots.description: Main fabrication isometric / spool drawing area for the duct spool
Bill of Materials — Revit Schedule view inside the right-strip
Cut list / lengths summary — small schedule
Spool reference list — drafting view callout linking to other spools

families.description: Fabrication assembly title block — conduit / cable assembly. Discipline accent stripe in #7B3F00. Drawable 636×509 mm — fits a typical 1:25 spool isometric.

slots.description: Main fabrication isometric / spool drawing area for the conduit / cable assembly
Bill of Materials — Revit Schedule view inside the right-strip
Cut list / lengths summary — small schedule
Spool reference list — drafting view callout linking to other spools

A1 landscape, 200 mm BOM strip on the right (6 cols × 18 rows), 80 mm bottom title strip with fab metadata (SPOOL # / DISCIPLINE / WEIGHT / FAB LOC / STATUS / BOM REV / ISSUE DATE / PROJECT / DRG NO). Discipline accent stripe in #5A5A5A. Drawable 636×509 mm — fits a typical 1:25 spool isometric.

slots.description: Main fabrication isometric / spool drawing area for the hanger / support
Bill of Materials — Revit Schedule view inside the right-strip
Cut list / lengths summary — small schedule
Spool reference list — drafting view callout linking to other spools

families.description: Presentation title block (colour) — A1 landscape, FULL-BLEED render area (entire sheet is the slot). Bottom-right 280×60 mm watermark with project / title / rev / date / drawn / client. Designed for renders, perspectives, full-page axonometrics — the watermark is deliberately minimal so the artwork dominates.

slots.description: Caption strip overlay — drawing title + scale annotation

families.description: Presentation title block (monochrome) — A1 landscape, FULL-BLEED render area (entire sheet is the slot). Bottom-right 280×60 mm watermark with project / title / rev / date / drawn / client. Designed for renders, perspectives, full-page axonometrics — the watermark is deliberately minimal so the artwork dominates.

slots.description: Caption strip overlay — drawing title + scale annotation

families.description: Project / package cover sheet — A1 landscape, NO drawable zone (viewport placement deliberately blocked). Top dark-blue banner, amber accent band, large centred project name + address + client + RIBA stage. Bottom strip carries deliverable status, revision, issue date, transmittal ref.

Discipline section divider — A1 landscape, large grey background panel, huge centred discipline label (60 mm — e.g. 'MEP', 'STRUCTURAL', 'ARCHITECTURAL'), project code below. Minimal 50 mm bottom strip carries discipline / project / deliverable identifiers. Used between disciplines in a multi-discipline package.

slots.description: Discipline-coloured panel — auto-tinted by the project's discipline band rule

families.description: Drawing register sheet — A1 landscape. Full-page 9-column × 24-row schedule (# / DRAWING TITLE / SHEET NO / REV / STATUS / DATE / DRAWN / CHKD / APVD). 60 mm bottom strip carries project + deliverable + rev. The actual register is populated by ExportSheetRegister at print time — this title block just provides the static frame.

slots.description: Drawing-register schedule view — Revit Sheet List populated by ExportSheetRegister

families.description: Transmittal cover sheet — A4 landscape (297×210 mm). Header carries TX REF / DATE / REV. Two-column recipient block (TO / FROM) with name + address. Middle: 'ACCOMPANYING DOCUMENTS' table that ExportSheetSet populates with the drawings being transmitted. Bottom 30 mm signature strip with SIGNED / DATE RECEIVED / ACKNOWLEDGED columns.

staticText.text: SHEET NO / TITLE / REV / STATUS / DATE

slots.description: Recipient (TO) block — populated from Transmittal recipient list
Accompanying-documents schedule — populated from the export bundle

families.description: Statutory submission title block — KAMPALA CAPITAL CITY AUTHORITY (KCCA). A1 landscape with a prominent 80 mm regulator banner across the top, statutory disclaimer band under it, and a 4-cell bottom identity strip (PROJECT / PERMIT NO / SUBMISSION DATE / AUTHORISED BY). Banner accent in #006937. Drawable zone 821 × 369 mm.

staticText.text: Submitted under the Building Control Act 2013 (Uganda) — Physical Planning Act, 2010

slots.description: Main drawing area for the KCCA submission
KCCA regulator stamp — placeholder for the official seal scanned in at submission time

families.description: Statutory submission title block — ELECTRICITY REGULATORY AUTHORITY (ERA). A1 landscape with a prominent 80 mm regulator banner across the top, statutory disclaimer band under it, and a 4-cell bottom identity strip (PROJECT / PERMIT NO / SUBMISSION DATE / AUTHORISED BY). Banner accent in #1F4E79. Drawable zone 821 × 369 mm.

staticText.text: Submitted under the Electricity Act, Cap 145 — installation compliance per the Electricity (Installation Permits) Regulations 2003

slots.description: Main drawing area for the ERA submission
ERA regulator stamp — placeholder for the official seal scanned in at submission time

families.description: Statutory submission title block — NATIONAL ENVIRONMENT MANAGEMENT AUTHORITY (NEMA). A1 landscape with a prominent 80 mm regulator banner across the top, statutory disclaimer band under it, and a 4-cell bottom identity strip (PROJECT / PERMIT NO / SUBMISSION DATE / AUTHORISED BY). Banner accent in #7B3F00. Drawable zone 821 × 369 mm.

staticText.text: Submitted under the National Environment Act 2019 — environmental impact assessment per the EIA Regulations 2020

slots.description: Main drawing area for the NEMA submission
NEMA regulator stamp — placeholder for the official seal scanned in at submission time

families.description: RFI / clarification sketch sheet — A3 landscape (420 × 297 mm). Two-pane layout: left half is a legend / schedule for the QUERY text, right half is a SKETCH slot for annotated plan or detail. 25 mm header carries 'RFI / CLARIFICATION' + RFI REF. 30 mm footer carries PROJECT / DATE / REV.

slots.description: Left half — RFI query text area (legend or schedule view)
Right half — sketch / detail / annotated plan view
Markup overlay — review-cloud detail view layered on top of SKETCH
Tiny revision strip above the sketch — RFI lifecycle history
